WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: carbon
RIGHT: rose
TOP: cello
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: harps
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: pear
SOUTHWEST: wrench
SOUTHEAST: mimosa
HERE: tiger
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: cutlery
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: trivet
OUTSIDE: daffodil

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: carbon
RIGHT: rose
TOP: cello
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: harps
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: pear
SOUTHWEST: wrench
SOUTHEAST: mimosa
HERE: tiger
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: cutlery
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: trivet
OUTSIDE: daffodil

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: carbon
RIGHT: rose
TOP: cello
BOTTOM: elephant
CENTER: harps
NORTHWEST: pig
NORTHEAST: pear
SOUTHWEST: wrench
SOUTHEAST: mimosa
HERE: tiger
THERE: cleanser
NOWHERE: cutlery
EVERYWHERE: zinc
INSIDE: trivet
OUTSIDE: daffodil

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: Zinc is everywhere.
QUESTIONER: What is on your right?
ANSWER: Rose is on the right.
QUESTIONER: What is there?
ANSWER: Cleanser is there.
QUESTIONER: What is at the top?
ANSWER: Cello is at the top.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northwest?
ANSWER: Pig is in the northwest.
QUESTIONER: What is at the center?
ANSWER: Harps are at the center.
QUESTIONER: What is outside?
ANSWER: Daffodil is outside.
QUESTIONER: What is at the bottom?
ANSWER: Elephant is at the bottom.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southwest?
ANSWER: Wrench is in the southwest.
QUESTIONER: What is here?
ANSWER: Tiger is here.
QUESTIONER: What is on your left?
ANSWER: Carbon is on the left.
QUESTIONER: What is nowhere?
ANSWER: Cutlery is nowhere.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northeast?
ANSWER: Pear is in the northeast.
